reviews.comment:
La atención es desorganizada, no me enteré de que los combos son con línea Pepsi hasta que tenía todo y estaba en caja, con o cuál era una molestia ir a cambiar la bebida, tampoco supe que podéis agregar lechuga y tomate al sandwich hasta después de comer. Muy ruidoso. Cabe aclarar que la ruta estaba muy liviana, no me quiero imaginar cuando está llena.

(Translated by Google)
The service is disorganized. I didn't realize the combos came with Pepsi until I had everything and was at the register. It was a hassle to go and change the drink. I also didn't know you could add lettuce and tomato to your sandwich until after you'd eaten. It's very noisy. It's worth noting that the route was very light; I can't imagine when it's full.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnN3R2UDd3RRAB
